_metadata.title: EU database for high-risk AI systems listed in Annex III

obligations.source_quote: The data listed in Sections A and B of Annex VIII shall be entered into the EU database by the provider or, where applicable, by the authorised representative.
obligations.addressee_note: Provider (or authorised representative) of a high-risk AI system listed in Annex III

decomposed_atoms.description: Provider must enter Annex VIII Sections A and B data into the EU database
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The data listed in Sections A and B of Annex VIII SHALL be entered into the EU database by the provider or authorised representative

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: EU database registration records, Annex VIII data preparation, registration confirmation

cross_references: Annex VIII Sections A and B

obligations.source_quote: The data listed in Section C of Annex VIII shall be entered into the EU database by the deployer who is, or who acts on behalf of, a public authority, agency or body, in accordance with Article 49(3) and (4).
obligations.addressee_note: Deployer who is, or acts on behalf of, a public authority, agency, or body

decomposed_atoms.description: Public-authority deployers must enter Annex VIII Section C data into the EU database
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Deployers who are public authorities SHALL enter Section C data into the EU database per Art. 49(3) and (4)

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: Deployer registration records, public authority classification, Annex VIII Section C data

obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to deployers who are, or act on behalf of, public authorities
